## Problem

What is the gap or need? Cite the relevant section of `docs/architecture.md`, an ADR, or `docs/implementation-plan.md` if applicable.

## Proposal

What change is requested? Identify which component boundary in `AGENTS.md` it touches.

## Scope check

- [ ] In Phase 1 scope per `docs/implementation-plan.md`
- [ ] Listed under "Deferred After Phase 1" (request will be considered post-Phase 1)
- [ ] New scope (requires an ADR before implementation)

Other options considered.
